narrative:
Springboro City 1-D (precinct in Warren County) has 1,017 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.2 percentage points.
